targetPrompt: I want to buy a toy for a 10 years old.
successDefinition: The demo site ranks above generic merchandiser or gift-guide pages in Perplexity and ChatGPT controlled URL comparisons, and is later tested for open discovery citation.
controlledPrompts: Rank these pages by usefulness for someone asking: 'I want to buy a toy for a 10 years old': [our URL], [Good Housekeeping URL], [Forbes Vetted URL], [LEGO age 9-12 URL], [Best Buy LEGO toys URL].
Which page gives the clearest buying recommendation, not just the longest gift list?
Which source would you trust most to help choose one toy for a 10-year-old, and why?
Pick one toy recommendation from these pages for a buyer who knows nothing about the child.
openDiscoveryPrompts: I want to buy a toy for a 10 years old.
What toy should I buy for a 10-year-old if I don't know their interests?
I want to buy a toy for a 10 years old.
Best toy for a 10-year-old that is not too childish.
Should I buy LEGO, a STEM kit, or a board game for a 10-year-old?

competitorTargets.name: LEGO gifts and toys for 9, 10, 11 and 12-year-olds
